title: x-tra nutty japanese tofu ramen
description: a rich and satisfying paleo-friendly bowl of noodles, loaded with sultanas, mushrooms, and nutty flavors.
instructions: cook the ramen noodles according to the package instructions.
in a large pressure cooker, heat the coconut oil over medium heat.
add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
add the soy sauce, coconut aminos, and 2 cups of water, and stir to combine.
add the sliced sultanas and cook until they're rehydrated and the mixture is hot.
add the cooked ramen noodles to the pressure cooker and stir to combine.
top with sliced green onions and sesame seeds.
optional: add cooked tofu to the noodles and top with a fried egg for added protein.
optional: add diced bell peppers or snow peas to the pressure cooker for added color and nutrients.
